title: TargetCrosshair
description: A lightweight Fabric mod that replaces the vanilla crosshair with a fully customizable one! Configure color, and more through an easy-to-use GUI.
body:
**IMPORTANT NOTE: Your Cooldown bar will be not SHOWN, this is a bug. We'll take TIME to fix THIS.**

**Note: Your Minecraft May take Some TIME to Launch.**

# 🎯 TargetCrosshair

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bSFMQMEQsx8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

A lightweight Fabric mod that upgrades Minecraft's crosshair with **target detection**, **dynamic colors**, and a **fully customizable pixel editor**.

No server-side installation required. Works everywhere.

---

# ✨ Features

## 🔴 Target Detection

TargetCrosshair can automatically detect when you're aiming at an entity.

* Normal crosshair color when not targeting anything
* Instantly changes to your chosen target color when aiming at a player, mob, or entity
* Perfect for PvP and combat situations
* Fully client-side

### 📸 Preview

**GIF 1 - Crosshair turns red when aiming at a player**

![Dynamic Target Detection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NotViooXD/targetcrosshair-assets/main/TargetCrosshair.gif)

---

## 🎨 Custom Crosshair Editor

Create your own crosshair directly inside Minecraft.

Features:

* 15×15 pixel editor
* Pencil tool
* Eraser tool
* Undo
* Redo
* Clear
* Reset
* Live preview
* Saved automatically

Design anything you want:

* Dot crosshair
* Circle crosshair
* Plus crosshair
* Tactical crosshair
* Completely custom designs

### 📸 Preview

**Image 1 - Custom Crosshair Palette Editor**

![Crosshair Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NotViooXD/targetcrosshair-assets/main/Screenshot%202026-05-31%20165209.png)

---

## 🌈 Crosshair Color Customization

Fully customize your colors.

* Normal crosshair color
* Target crosshair color
* RGB color picker
* Instant visual updates

Make your crosshair:

* White
* Red
* Green
* Blue
* Purple
* Any color you want

### 📸 Preview

**Image 2 - Color Customizer**

![Color Customizer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NotViooXD/targetcrosshair-assets/main/Screenshot%202026-05-31%20165254.png)

---

## ⚙️ Easy Access

Configure the mod from:

* Mod Menu (if installed)
* In-game Settings button
* Built-in editor screen

No commands required.

---

## 📦 Requirements

* Fabric Loader
* Fabric API
* Cloth Config API

### Optional

* Mod Menu

---

## 🎮 Compatibility

✔ Minecraft 1.21.x

✔ Singleplayer

✔ Multiplayer

✔ Client-Side Only

✔ Vanilla Servers

✔ Modpacks

---

## 🚀 Installation

**NOTE: If You're using this mod version 1.0.1 so You Don't need to Install, ModMenu & Cloth Config API.**

1. Install Fabric Loader
2. Install Fabric API
3. Install Cloth Config API
4. Place TargetCrosshair inside your mods folder
5. Launch Minecraft

---
